source: presidio-hardened-x402 audit_log chain head (real entry); library 0.5.0
purpose: Demonstrates action-ref-v1 derived from a real presidio-hardened-x402 pre-execution decision log, cross-checked against the APS verifier (verify.py) and SDK (verify.mjs). See x402-foundation/x402#2332.

vectors.description: A PII_REDACTED screening decision record (recorded before signing), NOT a post-execution result. action_type is the audit event_type verbatim; scope is the requested-intent label for the policy envelope (human-readable, not a hash); timestamp normalized to mmmZ.

field_mapping.action_type: AuditEvent.event_type (verbatim; pre-execution control outcome / decision, NOT a post-settlement action)
field_mapping.scope: presidio:x402.pay:<resource origin> — requested-intent label from the policy envelope + resource_url; human-readable, not a hash
field_mapping.timestamp: AuditEvent.timestamp normalized from isoformat() (us,+00:00) to RFC 3339 mmmZ (== spec format_timestamp)
